description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a heavily armored, angular body with a dark metallic finish and prominent red accents. The vehicle is equipped with two large, forward-facing cannons mounted on the hood, and reinforced wheel wells housing four robust, off-road tires. The side panels display a striking white skull insignia on a red background, suggesting a menacing presence. The windows are small and reinforced, likely for protection, and the vehicle's surface is covered in rivets, panels, and mechanical details. The rear of the vehicle is fortified with additional armor plating and exhaust vents, while the overall design emphasizes durability and aggression. The vehicle's exterior is rugged, with visible wear and utilitarian features suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavily armored, dark metallic combat vehicle with red accents, forward-facing cannons, and skull insignia on the sides. It has reinforced off-road tires and a rugged, aggressive design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skull insignia on the red panel, two large cannons, and detailed armor plating.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the exhaust vents, rear armor, and the wide, reinforced tires.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, including the skull insignia and visible cannons.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the dual cannons, armored hood, and the robust front wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large forward-facing cannon mounts on the hood.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel armor plating, reinforced wheel wells, and sloped panels for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Dark metallic base with solid red accent panels and white insignia; no traditional camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White skull insignia on red panels on both sides of the vehicle.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, reinforced sidewalls.
